name: Vendor lock-in
description: Over-dependence on a single vendor for core platform capabilities
mitigation: Multi-vendor sourcing strategy and open standards adherence

name: Data migration failure
description: Loss or corruption of data during migration from legacy system
mitigation: Full backup + dry-run migration in staging environment

name: Performance degradation
description: System response times exceed SLA under peak load
mitigation: Load testing at 2x expected peak before go-live

name: Security vulnerability
mitigation: Automated dependency scanning in CI pipeline + 30-day patch SLA

name: Regulatory non-compliance
description: GDPR or industry-specific requirements not met at launch
mitigation: Legal review of data flows + DPO sign-off before go-live
